evals.name: bootstrap
evals.prompt: Set up stable labels for this project.

evals.name: assign-id
evals.prompt: Give this requirement an ID: Users must be able to reset their password via email.

evals.name: add-prefix
evals.prompt: We need a prefix for API endpoints.

evals.name: consistency
evals.prompt: Run a quick consistency pass — I just renamed DEC_3.

evals.name: near-miss
evals.prompt: List the top 5 features we need to build.

evals.name: existing
evals.prompt: Show me our current label setup.

evals.name: cross-ref
evals.prompt: The caching decision relates to REQ_3 — can you add that cross-reference?

evals.name: deprecation
evals.prompt: REQ_5 is no longer relevant since we dropped the mobile app.

evals.name: cross-ref-heavy
evals.prompt: Write a summary of how all our technical decisions relate to each other and which requirements they satisfy.

evals.name: batch
evals.prompt: Label all the unlabeled decisions and requirements in NOTES.md.

evals.name: implicit
evals.prompt: Add a new requirement: the API must respond within 200ms for all endpoints under normal load.

evals.name: split
evals.prompt: REQ_3 is actually two things — no mocking in integration tests AND no mocking in unit tests. Can you split it?

evals.name: merge
evals.prompt: DEC_3 and DEC_4 are really the same concern — deployment infrastructure. Can you merge them?

evals.name: promote
evals.prompt: OBS_1 from SHARPEN.md turned out to be a real requirement. Promote it to a REQ.

evals.name: crosscut
evals.prompt: The 200ms response time requirement affects both the API layer and the database query layer.
